meaning: n.昆虫,卑鄙的人adj..虫的,虫子一样的,对付虫子的
examples: At rest the insect looks like a dead leaf.
She scratched at the insect bites on her arm.
The roof timbers were affected by rot and insect attack.
They claim that insect-based food is not only tasty but also rich in protein.
That is important because the exact opposite has been found in the bumblebee, another social insect.
